channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Palace denies Ombudsman threatened lawmakers over VP Sara impeachment
item.description: The Palace has strongly denied recent claims by Senator Imee Marcos that the Office of the Ombudsman allegedly threatened congressmen who might vote against the impeachment of Vice President Sara Dute...

item.title: Passengers on cruise ship with Hantavirus outbreak to disembark in Spain
item.description: The MV Hondius, a cruise ship affected by a Hantavirus outbreak, is finally preparing to dock in Spain after being stranded at sea. Passengers, who have been confined on board due to health concerns, ...

item.title: EU Classifies All Cruise Ship Passengers as High-Risk After Hantavirus Outbreak
item.description: Europe’s health authorities have declared that all passengers aboard the MV Hondius, a cruise ship affected by a hantavirus outbreak, should be treated as high-risk contacts. The ship is expected to d...

item.title: Full list of major winners and highlights from AMVCA 2026 in Lagos
item.description: The 12th edition of the Africa Magic Viewers’ Choice Awards (AMVCA) happen for Lagos on Saturday night, gathering plenty big names for African entertainment industry, including actors, filmmakers, and...

item.title: Isuzu D-Max V-Cross impresses outside but interior lags behind
item.description: The Isuzu D-Max V-Cross 4×4 is a standout in the bakkie segment, especially in its Onyx Black variant which draws attention on the road. Powered by the familiar 3.0 litre four-cylinder turbodiesel eng...

item.title: CIDG to issue subpoena to Bato dela Rosa over EJK complaints, says Remulla
item.description: Interior Secretary Jonvic Remulla said the Philippine National Police-Criminal Investigation and Detection Group will issue a subpoena to Senator Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa as part of an investigation in...

item.title: Two Singaporean hikers killed after Mount Dukono eruption in Indonesia
item.description: Two Singaporean nationals who had been missing for several days have been confirmed dead following the eruption of Mount Dukono on Halmahera Island in Indonesia. According to local rescue authorities,...

item.title: Leaders Call for Community Action to Improve Safety for Women and Children in Nyali
item.description: Residents of Nyali and parts of Mombasa are growing increasingly worried due to a recent rise in insecurity incidents. Security expert and communication strategist Elkana Jacob has called for stronger...

item.title: Family Reflects on Findings of Inquest into Heather Winterstein’s Death at St. Catharines Hospital
item.description: Heather Winterstein, a 24-year-old Indigenous woman from the Cayuga Nation, died in 2021 at a St. Catharines, Ontario hospital due to septic shock. Her family, particularly her mother Francine Shimizu...

item.title: The Importance of Funding Medical Research for Better Health Outcomes
item.description: Colleen Lewis shares her personal experience with dry and wet macular degeneration to highlight the critical role of medical research in saving and improving lives. She stresses that consistent and in...

item.title: Cargo Vessel Reportedly Hit in the Strait of Hormuz as Maritime Tensions Continue
item.description: A cargo vessel was reported struck by an unknown projectile in the Strait of Hormuz, according to the U.K. Maritime Trade Operations center, which is affiliated with the Royal Navy. The incident took ...

item.title: Daniel Dubois Overcomes Early Knockdowns to Win WBO Heavyweight Title
item.description: Daniel Dubois displayed remarkable resilience and determination as he secured the WBO heavyweight title in an all-British clash against Fabio Wardley. Dubois suffered an early setback, being knocked d...

item.title: Jeep Accident in Oriental Mindoro Leaves 3 Dead and 12 Injured
item.description: A tragic road accident occurred in Oriental Mindoro when a jeep collided with a tree, resulting in three fatalities and twelve injuries. The incident has raised concerns about road safety and the cond...

item.title: Cirstea Upsets World Number One Sabalenka in Italian Open Third Round
item.description: Sorana Cirstea shock plenty tennis fans as she knock out world number one Aryna Sabalenka for the Italian Open third round in Rome. Sabalenka start the match strong, taking the first set 6-2 like say ...

item.title: Step-by-Step Guide to Cleaning and Preparing Your Patio for Summer
item.description: As the warmer months approach, now is the ideal time to prepare your patio for outdoor enjoyment. The first and most essential step is thorough cleaning. Sweep away debris and, if necessary, use a gar...

item.title: Stalin counters Vijay's claim of financial crisis in Tamil Nadu, asserts state's debt is within limits
item.description: In a sharp response to the new Chief Minister of Tamil Nadu, Mr Vijay of Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam, former CM MK Stalin has defended his previous DMK government's financial management. Stalin stated th...

item.title: One Nation achieves historic Farrer win, eyes further gains in Victoria and federal elections
item.description: One Nation has achieved a significant milestone with its first federal House of Representatives seat win in the Farrer byelection. Candidate David Farley secured 57.3% of the two-candidate preferred v...

item.title: Karachi gas supply halted due to pipeline damage during Red Line BRT work
item.description: On Saturday evening, major areas of Karachi experienced disruption in gas supply after a high-pressure 12-inch Sui Southern Gas Company (SSGC) pipeline was accidentally damaged near Jail Chowrangi dur...

item.title: Review of Mitsu in London EC2: A Lively and Enjoyable Japanese Dining Experience
item.description: Mitsu has opened in the space formerly occupied by Nobu Shoreditch, bringing a lighter, more inviting atmosphere to the Aethos hotel in east London. While Nobu was vast, dark and expensive, Mitsu offe...

item.title: A Comprehensive Guide to Common AI Terms and Concepts
item.description: Artificial intelligence (AI) is rapidly transforming industries, but its specialized terminology can be daunting even for tech professionals. This article provides a comprehensive glossary to help rea...
